content.full_text:
August 22, 2003

Councilmember Ray C. Luna
City of Santa Paula
Post Office Box 569
Santa Paula, CA 93061

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-159

Dear Mr. Luna:

This letter is to notify you that, at your request, we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice regarding your participation in the proposed Fagan Canyon project in the City of Santa Paula. Advice on this matter will instead be given to Santa Paula City Attorney, Karl H. Berger, who has been authorized by you to write a letter requesting advice on your behalf.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Adrianne Korchmaros
Political Reform Consultant
